name: project-sentinel
description: Autonomous Incident Resolution Engine — Project Sentinel

scripts.services: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run start --workspace=services/payment-service" "npm run start --workspace=services/inventory-service" "npm run start --workspace=services/notification-service"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVICES,HEALTH,API,DASHBOARD" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,blue,magenta" "npm run services" "npm run health-check" "npm run api" "npm run dashboard"
